title: The U.S. Military Said It Helped Bomb a Drug Camp in Ecuador. It Was a Dairy Farm.
summary_full: The Times visited a village where the United States and Ecuador said they destroyed an armed group’s training camp. Residents said it was actually a dairy farm.
summary_public: The Times visited a village where the United States and Ecuador said they destroyed an armed group’s training camp. Residents said it was actually a dairy farm.
